other_observers: Seen on 11/18 with Mark Peterson, Lisa Edwards, and Brad Steger.; Found by us on 11/18. Also, seen by Mymm Ackley later in the day on 11/18 and by David Silverman on 11/23.
description: A small gull, with a black nape on the white head, all black bill, black stripe in the wings. In flight a bold wing pattern, black and white W wing pattern, and black on the end of the tail. See the photo of the bird on the water.Behaviors: Swimming and flying around.Call: nonePlumage: juvenile
photographer: Photographer: Brandon K Percival, Brandon Percival, Brandon Percival
